title: Safety toolbox meeting before site walkthrough
summary: Conduct a safety toolbox meeting prior to the preliminary walkthrough during an energy audit site visit.

title: Stick to audit plan unless reality intervenes
summary: During site visits, adhere to the audit plan but be prepared to adapt when unexpected conditions arise.
evidence_quote: Stick to your plan… unless reality hits you in the face!

title: Data analysis tools for energy audits
summary: Use RETScreen, Excel, and ASHRAE forms for data analysis in energy audits.
